overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} \text {s = tf('s') ;} & \% \text {define Laplace variable} \\ \text {sysb = 100 / (s^3 + 10.1*s^2 + 101*s)} & \% \text {form transfer function} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} \text {s = tf('s') ;} & \% \text {define Laplace variable} \\ \text {sysG = 0.0002 / s ^ {2} ;} & \% \text {define system by its transfer function} \\ \text {t = 0:0.01:10;} & \% \text {set up time vector with dt = 0.01 sec} \\ & \% \text {pulse of 25N, at 5 sec, for 0.1 sec duration} \end{array}
